Home → Demo Hub → System Scale

Scale snapshot

The repo is large enough to prove a real program, but small enough to audit.

Every exact count shown below comes from a manifest, a file count, dashboard data, or the canonical export graph. The demo now exposes exact agent and department counts instead of inventing placeholders. The registry tracks registered command-center operating units, not live autonomous processes. Live runtime agents enabled: 0. Runtime activation: not started.

Exact counts we will not fake

Exact agent count: 47,979. Exact department count: 1,777. Exact unit count: 5,331. Exact family count: 175. Hierarchy levels: 7. Operational domains: 11. Source file: org_chart_export.json. Live runtime agents enabled: 0. Runtime activation: not started.

Runtime activation not started.

Registered vs runtime

  • Registered agents: 47,979
  • Live runtime agents: 0
  • Activation: not started
  • Meaning: the registry exists; automation remains disabled.

Why this matters

The value is not that 47,979 agents are running today. The value is that the command structure, safety model, registry, simulator, and review process are visible before runtime activation.

CategoryCountCount TypeSource / Method
MVP readiness layers completed8Source: generated from the presentation manifestpresentation manifest
Production verification reports67Source: derived from file countfind `09_exports -name '*production_verification_report.md'`

11 operational domains

Demo-facing operating domain map

Source type: demo-facing operating domain map derived from MVP-43 through MVP-50 readiness architecture.

  • Authentication / identity readiness
  • Request storage readiness
  • Audit ledger readiness
  • Approval gate readiness
  • Dry-run readiness
  • Controlled action queue readiness
  • Human-approved execution readiness
  • Monitoring / rollback / incident readiness
  • Demo / stakeholder review readiness
  • Validator / quality gate readiness
  • Safety boundary readiness

Verified scale is enough to matter

The repository has a meaningful surface area: reports, validators, dashboard artifacts, and structured manifests across multiple layers.

Exact counts are declared

The canonical export graph resolves exact agent and department counts with source traceability.

Recommended next docs step

Use the agent registry page and traceability HTML as the published registry surface for stakeholder review.

Glossary

Plain-English translation for the demo terms

Registered agent

A registered command-center operating unit listed in the static org-chart registry.

Live runtime agent

A live autonomous process. The count is 0 in this build.

Runtime activation

Turning on live execution. It has not started.

Static simulator

A browser-only in-memory demo that does not call backends or execute actions.

Backend/Supabase readiness

The architecture is prepared, but live writes and public mutation remain disabled.

Validator

A script that checks files, markers, and safety conditions.

Safety gate

A hard stop that prevents unsafe movement into runtime or mutation flows.

MVP-50

The current verified demo milestone, summarized here as MVP-50 Production Verified.

© 2026 Devin O’Rourke. All rights reserved.

Agent Command Center, the demo pages, registry presentation, dashboard copy, visual layout, simulator materials, validator descriptions, and stakeholder presentation materials are protected project materials. No license, sale, transfer, or permission to reuse is granted by viewing this demo.

This site is a static, read-only demonstration. It does not enable live automation, command execution, database writes, Supabase mutations, deployment actions, rollback execution, alert sending, or runtime activation.

Third-party names, platforms, and services referenced for context remain the property of their respective owners.
